author: cmoskvitin
description: Enter Zen mode to focus on writing. The plugin expands current tab to full screen removing everything but content.

manifest.name: ProZen

name: ProZen

releases.author: cmoskvitin
releases.description:
# Improvements
- Added new toggle **Force content centering**. When toggled on, makes text centered in Zen mode, even if _Editor -> Readable line width_ in your vault settings is toggled off.
- Code cleanup

releases.author: cmoskvitin
releases.description:
# Improvements

- Added an ability to turn other views fullscreen, not only text (MarkdownView -> ItemView). So now it's possible to go fullscreen in graph view. (@Quorafind thx for pointing this out)
- For graph view, since the graph tends to be circular, the vignette effect also has been made circular (radial gradient as opposed to the linear gradient in text views). The gradients now have separate settings in terms of scale.
- Added graph controls removal toggle for graph view.
- Removed limitations on gradient's scale, now it can go all the way to the middle of the screen, if the user wants to. I didn't see much point in this, but some people said they want this. So I removed the limitation.
- Improved settings' structure, names and descriptions. Hope they are easier to understand now.

# Bugfixes
- Fixed the known issue of keeping the CSS classes when exiting fullscreen with Esc key rather than with a custom hotkey. (again thx to @Quorafind)
